description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and velvetty in-seam, half sleeves and graphic print with applique work and embroidery on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Deisgned for those lee fans who have supported the brand for over a century now, this black t-shirt from lee with its appliqued and embroidered work on the left chest, and graphic print across the front, is an absolutely stylish wear. Team this comfortable cotton tee with jeans or shorts and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
